user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Oatly
Product type: oat milk dairy alternative
Tone: playful, honest, eco-conscious
Visual style: Bold, hand-drawn illustrations with bright colors and quirky typography that convey a fun and approachable personality.
Conceptual technique: humorous, irreverent storytelling with a focus on sustainability and transparency
Format: image

brief.visual_style: Bold, hand-drawn illustrations with bright colors and quirky typography that convey a fun and approachable personality
brief.conceptual_technique: humorous, irreverent storytelling with a focus on sustainability and transparency
brief.headline: Milk Made by Oats. Not Cows.
brief.body_copy: Why drink milk from stressed-out cows when you can sip on creamy, eco-friendly oats? Oatly is here to shake up your mornings with a taste that’s honest, delicious, and guilt-free. Because saving the planet should never be boring.
brief.call_to_action: Choose Oatly. Love your oats. Love your planet.

visual_direction.illustrations: Hand-drawn style with chunky outlines featuring quirky oat characters wearing sunglasses, happily swimming in a river labeled 'Sustainability Stream'. A cow character looks confused holding a ‘Stress Level: High’ sign.
visual_direction.color_palette: Bright yellows, vibrant greens, and warm blues to evoke optimism and nature.
visual_direction.typography: Playful, uneven, hand-lettered type that complements the illustrations and feels approachable and fun.
visual_direction.layout: Central oat character with bold headline above, supporting copy below, and call to action in a brightly colored speech bubble. Background includes whimsical hand-drawn leaves and eco-icons like recycling symbols and water drops.
visual_direction.branding: Oatly logo in bottom right corner, integrated seamlessly with the hand-drawn elements.
